title: UwU-ified
description: Make your Minecraft cuter :3 (or in other words, curse it)
body:
# The Minecraft UwU-ifier!
Make your Minecraft... something, that's for sure.

This resource pack adds a custom language that "UwU-ifies" the game, replacing every "R" and "L" with a "W", adding little faces to the end of everything, and changing hands and feet to "paws". It's quite stupid, and was made in about an hour on an "I want this but all the other resource packs that do this are for 1.16.5 so I'm going to write a Python script that does this for me" basis. So if you want to know why it exists, blame boredom and the people who did it already (for an older version of the game).

tl;dr makes minecraft "cute". made in a night, for no reason at all.

## How do I enable it?
Step 1: Turn on the resource pack. I'm assuming that you already had the brains to put it into your Minecraft folder (or used a Minecraft launcher that isn't Vanilla).

Step 2: Find the language in the Language menu. From the Minecraft options menu, go into "Languages" and find the language titled "UwU" (name subject to change in the future but it should be something along those lines). Enable the language and press "Done".

Step 4: Enjoy the ~~cursedness~~ cuteness! :3
